name: Rates.gamma_median

args.name: n
args.description: The number of equal-probability Gamma categories

args.name: alpha
args.description: The shape parameter for the Gamma distribution

title: The median-discretized Gamma rate heterogeneity model
description: This model uses equal-probability categories represented by their medians to approximate Gamma-distributed rates across sites. The rates are normalized to have mean one when applied to the substitution model.

citation.title: Maximum likelihood phylogenetic estimation from DNA sequences with variable rates over sites: approximate methods
